description_long: This is a large, rectangular, dark wood cabinet with a polished stone or marble top and a prominent raised section running along its length, possibly for organizing or displaying items. The front and back faces feature multiple small drawers, each with a metal handle, suggesting it is designed for storage and organization of many small items. The raised section on top appears to have a series of vertical slots or dividers, likely for sorting documents, files, or other flat objects. The cabinet's finish is sleek and glossy, with a dark, almost black coloration and subtle veining on the top surface. The sides are solid and unadorned, emphasizing the functional, utilitarian design. This type of cabinet would be well-suited for use in urban environments such as libraries, offices, or public service counters where organization and accessibility are important.
description: A large, dark wood cabinet with many small drawers and a glossy stone top, featuring a raised organizer section with vertical slots. Ideal for storage and sorting in urban public or office settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing multiple rows of small drawers with handles and the raised organizer section on top.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the cabinet, the solid side panels, and the length of the raised organizer.
description_view_2: Back view mirroring the front, with additional drawers and the raised organizer section visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the solid side panels and the full length of the raised organizer.
